## Summary

- Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant ES/EN routes reviewed
- [ ] `robots.txt` and `sitemap.xml` reviewed if routing or SEO changed
- [ ] Cloudflare Pages branch preview reviewed if UI or content changed
- [ ] `CI Checks` is green

## Risk

- Note any rollout risk, follow-up, or rollback concern.
